raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Context check","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately?","description":"Safe opener that lets Priya set the frame before anything specific gets discussed.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Refactor landing","name":"How did the payments refactor land for you?","description":"Surfaces whether the recent win felt complete, stressful, or still unresolved from her side.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team presence","name":"I've noticed you've been quieter in standup — what's the story there?","description":"Checks whether the change in team presence is just rhythm or something else worth understanding.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Recognition gap","name":"What felt missing in how the refactor was recognised?","description":"Finds out whether the win was credited in the way she would have wanted and what to repeat next time.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Repeatable wins","name":"What should we make sure to repeat from that refactor on the next hard project?","description":"Pulls out the practices worth carrying forward from the recent delivery.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring shape","name":"What would mentoring actually look like in your week right now?","description":"Makes the mentoring interest concrete in terms of time, format, and trade-offs.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring trade-off","name":"What would you need to drop to make space for mentoring?","description":"Surfaces the real cost of taking mentoring back up and whether the trade-off feels workable.","purpose":"competency","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Billing prep","name":"What would help you ramp fastest when the billing rewrite starts?","description":"Lets her name the context, inputs, or setup she would want before a new major project begins.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Dependency map","name":"What are you waiting on that could quietly slow the billing rewrite down?","description":"Looks for hidden dependencies or missing context without prematurely naming the rewrite as a concern.","purpose":"competency","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-step close","name":"What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?","description":"Closes by turning the check-in into a specific next action or outcome.","purpose":"competency","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
